scripts.deploy:prod: cross-env STAGE=prod bun --env-file ../../.env.production alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-other
scripts.deploy:staging: cross-env STAGE=staging bun --env-file ../../.env.staging alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-other
scripts.destroy:prod: cross-env STAGE=prod bun --env-file ../../.env.production alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-other
scripts.destroy:staging: cross-env STAGE=staging bun --env-file ../../.env.staging alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-other
scripts.dev: cross-env STAGE=local bun --env-file ../../.env.local alchemy dev --app cf-starter-other
